title: lappula cucullata
intro: Lappula cucullata, also known as the hooded lappula, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lappula cucullata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Lappula cucullata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
